reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of post hoc thresholds and human-in-the-loop evaluation, but does not open fundamentally new territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links underdetermined thresholds, framework-relative simplicity, and nonsense premises to expose dependence on human judgment.
falsifiable_why: Testable if threshold and evaluator roles are operationalized; otherwise claims risk immunization by retrospective reinterpretation.
explanation: LLM outputs remain proposals; humans still decide what counts as explanation or knowledge.
